title: PowerGems
description: A very customisable plugin that adds gems with powerful abilities!
body:
## **REQUIRES [SealLib](https://modrinth.com/plugin/seallib)**


# PowerGems
Our plugin introduces custom gems given when a player when they first join the server. Each gem has its own unique ablities. (See [Here](https://powergems.iseal.dev/overview/the-gems-and-their-ablities) for the ablity list)

The plugin is also completely translatable, with many languages coming out of the box, and has an API that makes it really easy to add gems of your own (refer to the wiki for more info).

## Resourcepack for the gems

The plugin requires at least some configuration to be balanced (cooldowns and such)


## FAQ
### Q: Should I join the discord?
A: Yes! You can find sneak peeks for what I'm working on there and talk with me and the community.

### Q: Where can I find a resource pack?

A: You can find any pack in this [collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/wGK8f7HI)

### Q: What are the default recipes?

A: Default recipes are shown [HERE](https://powergems.iseal.dev/overview/crafting) on the wiki, it can and should be able to be edited, the ones on the wiki are defaults

### Q: What abilities do the gems have?
A: All of those can be found on [the wiki](https://powergems.iseal.dev/overview/the-gems-and-their-ablities). More can be added thorugh addons with an API.

### Q: How can I add gems?
A: You can add gems through the API, more info about that on the wiki.

### Q: Is there a best gem?
A: On a well configured server, there shouldnt be.
This plugin requires server owners to configure it at least slightly for it to be balanced.

### Q: Is there a bedrock resource pack?
A: No. We do not support bedrock officially, and therefore geyser compatibility can be a hit or miss.

### Q: How do I edit languages or add new ones?
A: Simply make a new file in /plugins/PowerGems/languages following the format Messages_[a-z]{2}_[A-Z]{2}.properties and set it as the lang file in the configuration

## Need More Help? 
Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ar7SMdkecQ) for support!
